task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the ANCOVA analysis module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi interface should display the 'ANCOVA' analysis setup panel on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Set Exam as Dependent Variable, Gender as Fixed Factor, and Anxiety as Covariate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ANCOVA setup panel, 'Exam' should be visible in the 'Dependent Variable' box, 'Gender' in the 'Fixed Factors' box, and 'Anxiety' in the 'Covariates' box.

task_completion.description: Enable partial eta-squared (η²p) for Effect Size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'partial η²' (or η²p) under the 'Effect Size' section in the ANCOVA setup panel must be checked.

task_completion.description: Enable the Homogeneity test (Levene's) under Assumption Checks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assumption Checks' section should be expanded, and the 'Homogeneity test' checkbox must be ticked.

task_completion.description: Add 'Gender' to the Estimated Marginal Means terms list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Estimated Marginal Means' section, 'Gender' should be visible in the 'Marginal Means' terms box on the right.

task_completion.description: Save the completed analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'ExamAnxiety_ANCOVA.omv' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory, or a file manager window showing the successfully saved file at this exact location.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jamovi application window being actively used, with mouse clicks or selections in the GUI menus.

integrity.description: The analysis results are generated by the software, not manually typed or pasted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The right-hand results panel in Jamovi should display dynamically generated, properly formatted tables for ANCOVA, Assumption Checks, and Estimated Marginal Means.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI analysis or copy a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'cp' or 'mv' to place the 'ExamAnxiety_ANCOVA.omv' file directly into the target directory without using Jamovi.
